posts.author: karent33 (Karen Nichol)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cant see my dropdown list column when I look in card view. Am I doing something wrong?
My board is set up with actors names on rows and a dropdown column where I choose which productions they are in (often more than One). I want to use the card view as a biography in essence, with a list of their productions on it. Can anyone help?
